reason: This finding involves a standard STIG hardening pattern for PAM configurations to prevent empty password logins. The remediation script uses authselect or sed, which are safe and conventional methods for editing PAM files, aligning with the policy for safe_to_remediate for auth/ssh/sudo/pam changes.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; Potential account lockout if accounts with empty passwords exist; May affect legacy applications relying on empty password authentication
